rationale: Elec. Code §15.051 governs voter registration confirmation notices. The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraisal and has no overlap with voter registration procedures.
quote: If the registrar has reason to believe that a voter's current residence is different from that indicated on the registration records, or that the voter's residence address is a commercial post office box or similar location that does not correspond to a residence, the registrar shall deliver to the voter a written confirmation notice requesting confirmation of the voter's current residence.
_note: No conflict; provisions address unrelated subject matters.
